name: Hotel Effectiveness (Actabl) Labor Management API
what_it_does: Hotel Effectiveness (Actabl) hospitality labor management and workforce analytics REST API for hotel labor cost optimization, housekeeping productivity, and workforce planning. Enables AI agents to manage daily labor budget and scheduling guidance for hotel department managers for labor cost optimization automation, handle housekeeping room assignment and productivity tracking for rooms division efficiency automation, access labor productivity benchmarking against hotel peer set for competitive performance automation, retrieve time and attendance integration with PMS occupancy data for labor efficiency reporting, manage variance analysis and labor cost overage alerting for hotel operations intelligence, handle tipping and gratuity reporting for hotel associate pay compliance automation, access guest request and housekeeping task management for in-stay service automation, retrieve STR-integrated performance benchmarking for hotel competitive analytics, manage multi-property labor analytics for hotel portfolio management, and integrate Hotel Effectiveness with M3 accounting, opera PMS, and ADP payroll for full hospitality workforce ecosystem.
use_cases: Optimizing housekeeping labor from productivity agents
Alerting labor overages from operations intelligence agents
Benchmarking hotel performance from analytics agents
Managing room assignments from housekeeping agents
not_for: Full HR and payroll processing (use ADP or Paycom)
Restaurant and F&B labor management (use HotSchedules or 7shifts)
best_when: A hotel management company, hotel owner, or individual property operator wanting AI agents to automate daily labor budget management, housekeeping productivity tracking, labor cost variance alerting, and multi-property workforce analytics within Hotel Effectiveness/Actabl.
avoid_when: MINIMUM WAGE AND OVERTIME COMPLIANCE IN AUTOMATED SCHEDULING: Automated scheduling guidance from Hotel Effectiveness must not result in FLSA overtime violations or state minimum wage shortfalls; hotel department managers must validate automated scheduling recommendations against actual associate pay rates and overtime rules before implementation. HOUSEKEEPING PRODUCTIVITY STANDARDS AND INJURY RISK: Automated housekeeping room assignment using productivity targets (rooms per person per hour) must account for room complexity, stay-over vs checkout, and associate physical capacity; automated productivity-maximizing assignment without ergonomic consideration creates musculoskeletal injury risk and OSHA recordable exposure. TIPPING AND GRATUITY REPORTING ACCURACY: Automated tipping and gratuity tracking for hotel associates must comply with IRS tip reporting requirements (Form 4137) and state tip credit laws; automated tip reporting with systematic errors creates payroll tax liability for hotel employer.

auth.notes: Hotel Effectiveness uses API key and OAuth authentication. REST API with JSON. Atlanta, Georgia HQ (Actabl, parent company). Founded 2004 as Hotel Effectiveness. Acquired by Actabl (formerly known as Hotel Solutions Partnership). Actabl also includes ProfitSword (financial analytics) and ALICE (guest operations). 3,000+ hotel properties on platform. Housekeeping and rooms division labor focus. M3 accounting integration. STR benchmarking integration. Competes with Unifocus, Ximble, and HotSchedules for hotel labor management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-property annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual per-property subscription; labor management, housekeeping, and analytics modules; Actabl platform bundle with ProfitSword and ALICE
pricing.notes: Atlanta GA. Actabl subsidiary. Founded 2004. 3,000+ hotel properties. Rooms division labor focus. Per-property annual subscription. M3 and STR integration.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; labor and scheduling queries throttled; no webhooks — polling required

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — LABOR AND HOUSEKEEPING EVENTS REQUIRE POLLING: Hotel Effectiveness does not support native webhooks; automated labor overage alerts, housekeeping completion events, and PMS occupancy-based scheduling guidance require scheduled polling aligned with hotel operational cycles (morning briefing, midday labor check, evening close)

HOUSEKEEPING PRODUCTIVITY TARGET ERGONOMIC VALIDATION: Automated housekeeping room assignment based on productivity targets must be validated against associate contract or union MOU productivity standards; automated assignment exceeding bargained productivity expectations creates union grievance; verify productivity standard per property before automated housekeeping optimization

PMS OCCUPANCY DATA FRESHNESS FOR LABOR GUIDANCE: Hotel Effectiveness labor guidance is calculated from PMS occupancy and forecast data; automated labor scheduling based on stale PMS occupancy (before night audit, before group pickup) creates inaccurate labor budget; implement PMS occupancy data freshness check before automated labor guidance generation

Actabl platform product integration coupling — Hotel Effectiveness is one of three Actabl products (Hotel Effectiveness, ProfitSword, ALICE); integrated Actabl automation requires understanding API boundaries between products; ALICE handles guest operations (requests, work orders) while Hotel Effectiveness handles labor; cross-product data requires separate API credentials and endpoints

Multi-property management company vs single property operator API access — Hotel Effectiveness API credentials and data access scope differ for management company portfolio access vs single-property operator; automated multi-property labor analytics requires management company API credential configuration with property scope; verify credential type for intended access scope

Tipping and service charge state law compliance — automated tipping and gratuity reporting in Hotel Effectiveness must reflect state-specific service charge distribution requirements; in states like California, mandatory service charges may be classified as wages subject to payroll tax, not tips; automated tip reporting without state-specific classification creates payroll tax and labor law exposure
agent_readiness.security_notes: Hotel labor management. SOC2. API key/OAuth. US. Employee labor, housekeeping, and payroll data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Hotel labor analytics. SOC2. API key/OAuth. US. Employee labor and housekeeping productivity data.
